parameters.subject: =🚨 BUY SIGNAL — {{ $json.Ticker }} @ Rs. {{ $json.Price }}
parameters.message: =📊 PAPER TRADE - BUY SIGNAL  🔹 Stock: {{ $json.Ticker }} 🔹 Entry Price: Rs. {{ $json.Price }} 🔹 Quantity: {{ $json.quantity }} shares 🔹 Capital Needed: Rs. {{ $json.capital_needed }}  🎯 Target: Rs. {{ $json.target }} 🛡️ Stop-Loss: Rs. {{ $json.stop_loss }} ⚖️ Risk-to-Reward: 1:{{ $json.rr_ratio }}  🧠 Confidence: {{ $json.confidence }} 📝 Time: {{ $now.toLocaleString() }}  ⚠️ NOTE: This is paper trading — do not place real order yet.

parameters.text: =📉 PAPER TRADE - SELL SUMMARY  🔹 Stock: {{ $json.stock }} 🔹 Exit Price: Rs. {{ $json.exit_price }} ⏳ Hold Time: {{ $json.hold_duration }}  📊 --- Return Breakdown ---   ▫️ Buy Value:     Rs. {{ $json.buy_value }}   ▫️ Sell Value:    Rs. {{ $json.sell_value }}   ▫️ Gross Profit:  Rs. {{ $json.gross_profit }}  💸 --- Charges Deducted ---   ▫️ Brokerage:     Rs. {{ $json.brokerage }}   ▫️ STT:           Rs. {{ $json.stt }}   ▫️ GST:           Rs. {{ $json.gst }}   ▫️ Exchange Fee:  Rs. {{ $json.exchange }}   ▫️ SEBI Turnover: Rs. {{ $json.sebi }}   ▫️ Stamp Duty:    Rs. {{ $json.stamp }}   ▫️ Total Taxes:   Rs. {{ $json.total_charges }}  🏆 --- Net Result --- 🔥 Net Profit: Rs. {{ $json.net_profit }} ({{ $json.return_pct }}%)
